body.title: [gated] Domains specify model temperature (low-temp coding = less hallucination)
body.description:
**GATED — lower priority (Akien 2026-07-07); offload loop + scale first.**

**Idea:** Aider codes well partly because diff-based editing is hard to hallucinate. The temperature analogue: a DOMAIN should be able to specify the model TEMPERATURE for its inference (e.g. CodingDomain -> low temp for determinism/less hallucination; a design/ideation domain -> higher). Today the inference contract is tier-not-model (caller asks for a TIER); extend so a domain can carry a temperature (and possibly other sampling params) alongside its tier.

**Shape:** add an optional temperature to the domain/inference request; thread through the Inference Proxy; default preserves current behavior. Verify low-temp coding reduces edit hallucination on the aider/DS harness.

**Affected files:** TBD (inference proxy/router, CodingDomain, domain base). See note aider-diff-cline-ds-second-pass-2026-07-07.

**Completion test:** a domain sets temp; the proxy honors it end-to-end; a low-temp coding run is observably more deterministic than the default.

**Scope boundary:** domain-level temperature plumbing. NOT a full sampling-param overhaul.

**intention:** I intend that each domain controls its model temperature, so coding runs at low temp (less hallucination) without hard-coding a model.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
